name: Skill Optimizer
description: Auto-improve any Claude skill through iterative test-score-refine loops with a live dashboard.
longDescription:
Runs autonomous improvement loops on any skill's SKILL.md. You define **1-3 test inputs** and a **3-6 item yes/no scoring checklist**, then the optimizer loops up to **15 rounds**: execute the skill, score output against the checklist, make one targeted change, test again, keep if improved or revert if not.

Includes a self-contained `dashboard.html` with score-over-time chart, per-question pass/fail breakdown, and a kept/reverted changelog. Converges automatically at **95%+** on 3 consecutive rounds. Plateau strategy switches approaches (rules → examples → restructuring) after 3 non-improving rounds.
